data.policy.opencode-mcp.csv:
p, opencode-mcp, applications, get, *, allow
p, opencode-mcp, projects, get, *, allow
p, opencode-mcp, clusters, get, *, allow
p, opencode-mcp, logs, get, *, allow
p, opencode-mcp, applications, create, *, deny
p, opencode-mcp, applications, update, *, deny
p, opencode-mcp, applications, update/*, *, deny
p, opencode-mcp, applications, delete, *, deny
p, opencode-mcp, applications, delete/*, *, deny
p, opencode-mcp, applications, sync, *, deny
p, opencode-mcp, applications, override, *, deny
p, opencode-mcp, applications, action/*, *, deny
p, opencode-mcp, applicationsets, create, *, deny
p, opencode-mcp, applicationsets, update, *, deny
p, opencode-mcp, applicationsets, delete, *, deny
p, opencode-mcp, clusters, create, *, deny
p, opencode-mcp, clusters, update, *, deny
p, opencode-mcp, clusters, delete, *, deny
p, opencode-mcp, projects, create, *, deny
p, opencode-mcp, projects, update, *, deny
p, opencode-mcp, projects, delete, *, deny
p, opencode-mcp, repositories, create, *, deny
p, opencode-mcp, repositories, update, *, deny
p, opencode-mcp, repositories, delete, *, deny
p, opencode-mcp, certificates, create, *, deny
p, opencode-mcp, certificates, delete, *, deny
p, opencode-mcp, accounts, update, *, deny
p, opencode-mcp, gpgkeys, create, *, deny
p, opencode-mcp, gpgkeys, delete, *, deny
p, opencode-mcp, exec, create, *, deny
p, opencode-mcp, extensions, invoke, *, deny
